title: Mass unarchive
excerpt:
Description
I would like to request that in the archived section you can massively select all, instead of manually selecting one by one. 
What are you trying to achieve
Save time and effort by currently archiving in bulk…

posts.author: GreisyLara (Greisy Lara)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to request that in the archived section you can massively select all, instead of manually selecting one by one.

What are you trying to achieve

Save time and effort by currently archiving in bulk, but not unarchive.
